news.title: CPRA CONDEMNS ALLEGED UPND CADRE VIOLENCE ON JOURNALIST
news.excerpt: The Centre for Peace Research and Advocacy (CPRA) has condemned alleged violence by UPND cadres...
news.fullStory: CPRA CONDEMNS ALLEGED UPND CADRE VIOLENCE ON JOURNALIST... The Centre for Peace Research and Advocacy (CPRA) has condemned alleged violence by UPND cadres on a journalist. This act undermines democratic values and the freedom of the press in Zambia. We call upon the police to take immediate action.

news.title: Centre Urges Ministry of Justice to Expedite Draft Public Gatherings Bill
news.excerpt: The Centre for Peace, Research and Advocacy has urged the Ministry of Justice...
news.fullStory: The Centre for Peace, Research and Advocacy has urged the Ministry of Justice to expedite the Draft Public Gatherings Bill. This legislation is critical for ensuring that all citizens can assemble peacefully and safely.

news.title: Strategic Academic Partnership with University of Zambia Formalized
news.excerpt: We are pleased to announce that, following our weekly partnership negotiations...
news.fullStory: We are pleased to announce that, following our weekly partnership negotiations, we have formalized a strategic academic partnership with the University of Zambia (UNZA). This collaboration will focus on joint research in peacebuilding and restorative justice.

bills.name: Draft Public Gatherings Bill
bills.description: Proposed amendments to secure a level playing field for political assemblies and freedom of expression.

bills.name: Access to Information (ATI) Act
bills.description: Enabling transparency and public access to government documents for enhanced accountability.

bills.name: Restorative Justice Reform Bill
bills.description: Focusing on community-based mediation and reconciliation in juvenile criminal cases.

mapPoints.title: Land Tenure Dispute
mapPoints.description: High fragility due to rapid urbanization and mining land overlaps.

mapPoints.title: Political Violence Risk
mapPoints.description: Monitoring cadre activities and inter-party tension zones.

mapPoints.title: Climate Migration Study
mapPoints.description: Cross-border pastoralist movements causing localized tension.

mapPoints.title: Water Resource Access
mapPoints.description: Dispute over livestock watering points in drought-affected areas.

assessments.details: This assessment focused on the Shangombo district, identifying a 40% increase in localized disputes between settled farmers and nomadic herders. CPRA recommends immediate community-led water sharing agreements and mediation training for traditional leaders.

An audit of the Gwembe Valley land rights. Findings suggest that while structural peace remains stable, the introduction of large-scale commercial farming is displacing smallholder farmers. CPRA is facilitating dialogue between community stakeholders and investors.

Post-election fragility report. Despite a general decrease in national violence, urban markets in Lusaka remain flashpoints for extortion and intimidation by unaligned political cadres. Recommendations include strictly enforcing the Public Gatherings Bill.

fellowships.title: Post-Conflict Reconstruction Fellow
fellowships.description: In-depth academic research into indigenous mediation frameworks within rural Zambia. Candidates will work with UNZA faculty and CPRA field researchers.

fellowships.title: Regional Security Analyst
fellowships.description: Using data science and geospatial tools to map localized structural conflicts across the Southern African region.

fellowships.title: Human Rights & Policy Advocate
fellowships.description: Focus on monitoring current bills and providing evidence-based advocacy briefs for stakeholders in the Zambian government.

mous.description: A strategic milestone focused on advancing research in policy, peace studies, and student mentorship initiatives.
Collaborative framework for regional fragility assessments and localized conflict resolution across Southern Africa.
Joint initiative to expedite the review of the Public Gatherings Bill and promote democratic accountability.
Focus on child protection in conflict zones and integrated support for refugee communities in the region.
